rules.rule_text:
title: Netcat The Powershell Version
id: c5b20776-639a-49bf-94c7-84f912b91c15
related:
- id: bf7286e7-c0be-460b-a7e8-5b2e07ecc2f2
  type: derived
status: test
description: Adversaries may use a non-application layer protocol for communication
  between host and C2 server or among infected hosts within a network
references:
- https://nmap.org/ncat/
- https://github.com/besimorhino/powercat
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1095/T1095.md
author: frack113
date: 2021-07-21
modified: 2023-10-27
tags:
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.t1095
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: ps_classic_start
detection:
  selection:
    Data|contains:
    - 'powercat '
    - powercat.ps1
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
